title: More Trapdoors!
description: This datapack improves trapdoor crafting by making each recipe yield 6 trapdoors instead of 2. Now you get more value from your wood, making it easier to build and decorate!
body: # More Trapdoors! Crafting trapdoors just got better! Instead of only 2 trapdoors per recipe, this datapack boosts the output to 6, making wood usage more efficient. Perfect for builders, redstone enthusiasts, and anyone who loves trapdoors! ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command.
